title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Wano Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kid as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano Country Flower Capital

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just because the Courtesan is an absolute babe

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't mean you can ditch yer work, FRA-BOY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, boss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, forgive me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She was just such a fine woman!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't give a hoot! Look, I know you work enough for 10 men,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you can slack off every once in a while,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's the matter of my own word and honor, too, ya blocked!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GOTCHA! FORGIVE ME!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that matter you were going on and on about...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Takin' a look at the blueprints for the mansion on Onigashima, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Really?! Will ya really Lemme-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Actually, I just remembered something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: About 10 years ago... I pawn 'em.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Teehee()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Teehee?! You Bas- Tard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GOD- DAMN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oi! Whassa matter, franchise?! What happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I only worked under you

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For all those weeks because you said you had those plans, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FRA-BOY! HOW DARE YOU GRAB HOLD OF OUR LEADER!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just who in blazes do you think you are, you luckhead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sharrap, you idiots! Francosuke launcher!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Guwah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So the carpenters are fighting again, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Seems more heated than usual.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's it! You're fired! Get lost, nincompoop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine by me! I don't need ya anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, my...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh? Are you a fishmonger?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What sort of fish is this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A BREAM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Does dream really look like that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hm? Where are you hurrying off to?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How in the world should I cook this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Frano- Suke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kanjuro! What the hell sort of vendor are you supposed to be?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're stickin' out like a sore thumb! Look, kids have even started to gather!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kozi family retainer Kanquro of the evening rain

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen, I've got bad news! I was way off the mark!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fawn shop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: An item from 10 years ago?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Manson blueprints?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm, things like that don't often come through here, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I suppose it must be that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHA-?! do you really have it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, well, no. It's been swept away, naturally.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: who bought that thing again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right! Tamagoro from the longhouses! He said he wanted to study it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Blue- prints?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, I had 'em a while ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I let the rent pile up and the landlord carried 'em off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mr. Koubee did!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Blueprints, eh? They certainly were quite nice. I gave them to my favorite Geisha.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My dear Kisegawa! D'ya know her?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why would we?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 60 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
